expectations.text: Total income is correctly calculated as $10,500.00 (5500 + 3200 + 1800)
Total expenses are correctly calculated (sum of all negative amounts)
expectations.evidence: Output states 'Total spending across all categories: $3,338.05'

expectations.text: Spending is broken down by category with at least 5 categories shown
Net cash flow / surplus is calculated (income minus expenses)
Uses pandas for the analysis rather than manual calculation
expectations.evidence: No pandas or any data analysis library used. Analysis done by reading CSV directly.
